description: SOS response from Abasy Atlas: meta-curated LexA/RecA regulon with individual SOS genes (recA, lexA, uvrA-D, recN, sulA, umuDC, dinB, dinI, polB, ruvA/B, ssb).
name: SOS Response (Abasy-sourced)
notes: V6 = Abasy only. LexA regulon and RecA–LexA system; gene list from Abasy meta-curated E. coli network.
mermaid:
graph TD
    LEXA[LexA regulon]
    RECA[RecA]
    LEXA -->|repression| RECA_G[recA]
    LEXA -->|repression| LEXA_G[lexA]
    LEXA -->|repression| UVRA[uvrA]
    LEXA -->|repression| UVRB[uvrB]
    LEXA -->|repression| UVRC[uvrC]
    LEXA -->|repression| UVRD[uvrD]
    LEXA -->|repression| RECN[recN]
    LEXA -->|repression| SULA[sulA]
    LEXA -->|repression| UMUDC[umuDC]
    LEXA -->|repression| DINB[dinB]
    LEXA -->|repression| DINI[dinI]
    LEXA -->|repression| POLB[polB]
    LEXA -->|repression| RUVA[ruvA]
    LEXA -->|repression| RUVB[ruvB]
    LEXA -->|repression| SSB[ssb]
    RECA -->|cleavage| LEXA
    RECA_G -->|activation| RECA
    style LEXA fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style RECA fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style RECA_G fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style LEXA_G fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style UVRA fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style UVRB fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style UVRC fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style UVRD fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style RECN fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style SULA fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style UMUDC fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style DINB fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style DINI fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style POLB fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style RUVA fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style RUVB fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style SSB fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
scientificAccuracy: From Abasy Atlas v2.2 E. coli regulatory network; LexA regulon genes meta-curated from RegulonDB and others.

sources.title: Abasy Atlas
sources.note: Meta-curated bacterial regulatory networks; SOS/LexA regulon.
